latestIgtvVideos.title: HOW TO FOLD KING SIZE BEDDING
latestIgtvVideos.caption: SUPER KING BEDDING! Here’s the fold. Camera angles a bit naff. Give this a share or a save if you like 😁 #bedding #superking #bedroominspo #bedroom #homeinspo #organize #springclean

#ad Exciting news! This Christmas, I’ve partnered with @coteuk for the launch of their Côte at Home Festive Collection – luxury dining delivered to your door. In the Nights Before Christmas box, you can find my exclusive guide to wrapping tricky gifts and adding the perfect festive finishing touches - alongside a delicious three-course menu. Enjoy steak truffes and potato gratin, a dreamy dark chocolate mousse and a gift of luxurious crepe paper to give your presents a traditionally French feel. This year spend less time in the kitchen and more time with your loved ones getting Christmas-ready!

 #cotechristmas #coteathome #cote #christmaswrapping #nightsbeforechristmas #frenchfood #foodies
CHRISTMAS WRAPPING LESSONS NUMBER 2: how to wrap a bottle with tissue paper #wine #giftwrappingclasses #giftwrappingtips #giftwrappingworkshop #giftwrapping #giftwrap #home #champagne
CHRISTMAS WRAPPING LESSON NUMBER 1: easy pleats #giftwrap #giftwrapping #giftideas #giftwrappingclasses #giftwrappingtips #tutorial

latestIgtvVideos.title: HOW TO FOLD: a blanket for display
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Showing you a ranger roll and a ranger fold. This fold went viral on TikTok getting 35million views. I am very proud to get this extremely useful army fold out to the masses!

latestIgtvVideos.title: HOW TO FOLD: Duvet Covers and Pillow Cases
latestIgtvVideos.caption: But of a different tutorial from me but I feel like it’s time to slow it down and do some real time tutorials…let me know if this helped in the comments please ⬇️

latestPosts.caption:
What a fantastic night we had at @raffleslondon.theowo with our friends @thechambersguide and @thechambersvillage . 

Here’s every course from @maurocolagreco espionage menu. A must-visit for food lovers, luxury travellers and anyone fascinated by the building’s incredible history. 🍽️🍸

After dinner you can go to the secret 007 Spy bar for more cocktails and dancing 💃
